crime.value: Multiple student disappearances at boarding school
crime.quote: I bet it has something to do with those missing kids

victim.value: Missing students at Dorson All Boys Academy
victim.quote: none of the others here know that we care about the disappearances

closed_world.value: Dorson All Boys Academy boarding school with high-tech security systems
closed_world.quote: Why would you have an inadequate amount of lighting...but have a high tech lock system?!

investigator.value: Gray Van der Waal, new transfer student who becomes curious about the disappearances
investigator.quote: Gray Van der Waal. He said casually.

suspect_architecture.value: Multiple school figures including students and faculty - Naveed (insider knowledge of disappearances), missing students as potential victims/suspects, faculty members like Mr. McDonnall, and the mysterious female gym teacher
suspect_architecture.quote: none of the others here know that we care about the disappearances

red_herring.value: The focus on Gray's disruptive behavior and school adjustment issues may be misdirection from the real mystery of student disappearances
red_herring.quote: don't get me started on the missing studen--

social_world.value: Elite all-boys boarding school hierarchy with strict codes of 'Respect and Obedience', wealthy student body, and institutional power structures that may be concealing student disappearances
social_world.quote: here at Dorson-- Respect and Obedience are held at the highest regard

media_and_audience.value: Institutional suppression of information about missing students, with characters having to hide their interest in the disappearances from others
media_and_audience.quote: I have to make sure that none of the others here know that we care about the disappearances

investigator_wound.value: Gray's history of being transferred between multiple schools and his outsider status at the elite academy, making him both vulnerable and uniquely positioned to see institutional problems
investigator_wound.quote: since he's been to so many different schools

_meta.title: ebook sailorsenshi a k a ss the mystery at dorson all boys academy
